name: Information Security Policy
description: Overarching policy establishing information security governance, roles, and responsibilities across the Region.

name: Acceptable Use Policy
description: Defines acceptable use of Region-owned technology resources including devices, email, internet, and cloud services.

name: Incident Response Policy
description: Establishes the framework for detecting, responding to, and recovering from cybersecurity incidents.

name: Disaster Recovery & Business Continuity Policy
description: Defines requirements for DR/BC planning, testing, and maintenance for all critical municipal systems.

name: Access Control & Identity Management Policy
description: Establishes standards for user provisioning, authentication, authorization, and privileged access management.

name: Data Classification & Handling Policy
description: Defines data classification levels (Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted) and handling requirements for each.

name: Vendor & Third-Party Risk Management Policy
description: Requirements for assessing, monitoring, and managing cybersecurity risks from third-party vendors and service providers.

name: Cloud Security Policy
description: Security requirements for cloud service adoption, configuration, monitoring, and data protection in Azure, AWS, and SaaS.

name: Network Security & Segmentation Policy
description: Standards for network architecture, segmentation, firewall rules, VPN, and OT/IT network boundaries.

name: Vulnerability Management Policy
description: Defines vulnerability scanning cadence, remediation SLAs, exception process, and reporting requirements.

name: Security Awareness & Training Policy
description: Mandatory security training requirements, phishing simulation program, and role-based training for privileged users.

name: MFIPPA Privacy & Records Policy
description: Compliance with Municipal Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act for all personal information handling.

name: Encryption & Cryptographic Standards Policy
description: Standards for encryption at rest, in transit, key management, and certificate lifecycle management.

name: Mobile Device & BYOD Policy
description: Security requirements for Region-issued and personal devices accessing municipal systems and data.

name: OT/ICS Security Policy
description: Security requirements specific to operational technology and industrial control systems in water, wastewater, and traffic.
